name: Generic Premium Dog Food Bowl 1400ml Orange
description: Upgrade your pet’s dining experience with the Premium Curved Dog Plastic Food Bowl, designed for both style and practicality. With a generous 1400ml capacity, this bowl is perfect for satisfying even the hungriest of dogs or for multiple pet households. Key Features: Spacious Capacity: The 1400ml size ensures ample room for food or water, making it ideal for larger breeds or multiple servings throughout the day. Curved Design: The elegant, curved shape not only adds a touch of sophistication to your pet’s feeding area but also helps reduce spills and messes. Durable Plastic Construction: Made from high-quality, durable plastic, this bowl is built to withstand daily use and is resistant to cracks and breakage. Variety of Colors: Available in a range of vibrant colors, you can choose the perfect shade to match your home decor or your pet’s personality. Easy to Clean: The smooth plastic surface is easy to clean by hand or in the dishwasher, ensuring convenience for busy pet owners. Non-Slip Base: Designed with a non-slip base to prevent sliding and tipping, keeping your pet’s mealtime mess-free and enjoyable.
